mapping_metadata.analyzer: Senior Test Automation Mapping Specialist Agent

test_case_mappings.test_case_description: Test case to verify the Billing Cycle Period card behavior on Print and Payment History page when a plan is paused, including verification of complimentary pages, additional pages, progress bars, tooltips, and page count displays.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Enroll the Ink printer with 50 pages plan or higher.
precondition_mapping.notes: This precondition requires printer enrollment functionality. The batch contains dashboard elements but no enrollment flow page objects or API helpers for printer enrollment. Enrollment methods likely exist in other batches containing enrollment page metadata or API helper modules.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the Subscription has no free months info.
precondition_mapping.notes: This precondition requires API methods to verify subscription state. No API helper methods or subscription verification utilities found in this batch. These are UI metadata files only. API helpers likely exist in separate Python/JavaScript modules in other batches.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Make sure the subscription is "subscribed" status.
precondition_mapping.notes: Similar to precondition 1, this requires API methods to check subscription status. No API verification methods found in this UI metadata batch.

precondition_mapping.precondition_text: Click the Pause Plan button on CIT modal or "Pause Instant Ink" link to trigger the pause plan.

components_found_in_this_batch.ui_element_description: Button to temporarily pause Instant Ink subscription without full cancellation
components_found_in_this_batch.relevance_reason: This locator targets the Pause Instant Ink button which is explicitly mentioned in precondition 4. This button must be clicked to pause the plan before the main test steps begin. The data-testid attribute provides a stable selector for automation.

matched_locators.ui_element_description: Button to temporarily pause Instant Ink subscription without full cancellation
matched_locators.relevance_reason: This locator is directly relevant to precondition 4 which requires clicking the Pause Instant Ink button to pause the plan before test execution. The element is located on the dashboard page and uses a data-testid attribute for stable identification.

matched_constants.how_to_import: Not applicable - this is a metadata constant from JSON file
matched_constants.relevance_reason: This URL constant represents the base URL for the HP Instant Ink application. It is relevant for navigation in steps 1 and 4 where the test navigates to Print and Payment History page, and for precondition setup where the dashboard must be accessed to pause the plan.

step_level_mapping.step_action: Go to Print and Payment History page under HP Instant Ink.

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: No Print and Payment History page elements found in this batch. This batch contains Home page, Auth controls, Billing form, and Dashboard elements, but not the Print and Payment History page. The target page elements likely exist in a different batch containing Print and Payment History page metadata.

test_data_components_found_in_this_batch.notes: Base URL constant found. The full Print and Payment History URL would be constructed by appending the path to this base URL.

step_level_mapping.step_action: Check the Billing Cycle Period card.
step_level_mapping.step_expected_result: Verify the plan pause information is not displayed.

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: No Billing Cycle Period card elements found in this batch. This batch contains dashboard and billing form elements but not the Print and Payment History page where the Billing Cycle Period card is located.

test_data_components_found_in_this_batch.notes: No test data needed for this verification step.

step_level_mapping.step_action: Even shift 32 days and trigger billing charge.

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: This is an API operation requiring backend time manipulation. No API helper methods found in this UI metadata batch.

test_data_components_found_in_this_batch.notes: The 32 days value is hardcoded in the test case. No related constants found in this batch.

step_level_mapping.step_action: Go to Print and Payment History page under HP Instant Ink.

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: Same as step 1 - no Print and Payment History page navigation elements found in this batch.

test_data_components_found_in_this_batch.notes: Base URL constant available for navigation.

step_level_mapping.step_action: Check the Billing Cycle Period card.
step_level_mapping.step_expected_result: Verify the plan pause information is displayed well.

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: No Billing Cycle Period card elements or plan pause information elements found in this batch.

step_level_mapping.step_expected_result: Verify the Complimentary pages progress bar is displayed well.

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: No progress bar elements found in this batch. This batch contains form inputs and buttons but no progress bar UI elements.

step_level_mapping.step_action: For Desktop: Move the mouse cursor on the info icon. For Mobile/Tablet: Click on the info icon.
step_level_mapping.step_expected_result: Verify a tooltip with correct message is displayed well.

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: No info icon or tooltip elements found in this batch.

step_level_mapping.step_expected_result: Verify the value is displayed as "0 of 10(Pause Plan) used".

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: No complimentary pages value text elements found in this batch.

test_data_components_found_in_this_batch.notes: Expected value is hardcoded in test case.

step_level_mapping.step_expected_result: Verify the information with correct plan info is displayed well.

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: No complimentary pages info message elements found in this batch.

step_level_mapping.step_action: Print some pages(less than the plan, such as 6 pages). Refresh the dashboard page.
step_level_mapping.step_expected_result: Verify the "Complimentary pages" progress bar is filled with the black color and the value is displayed as correct (such as "6 of 10 used").

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: No progress bar or page count elements found in this batch. This step requires API call to simulate printing and UI elements to verify the result.

test_data_components_found_in_this_batch.notes: Page count value is hardcoded in test case.

step_level_mapping.step_action: Continue to print some pages(more than the plan, such as 15 pages). Refresh the dashboard page.
step_level_mapping.step_expected_result: Verify the progress bars for "Complimentary pages" and "Additional pages" are displayed well.

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: No progress bar elements for complimentary or additional pages found in this batch.

test_data_components_found_in_this_batch.notes: Page count value is hardcoded in test case.

step_level_mapping.step_expected_result: Verify the progress bar is filled with the Yellow color and the value is displayed correctly(such as "5 of 10 used").

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: No additional pages progress bar elements found in this batch.

test_data_components_found_in_this_batch.notes: Expected values are hardcoded in test case.

step_level_mapping.step_action: Check the icon. For Desktop: Move the mouse cursor on the info icon. For Mobile/Tablet: Click on the info icon.
step_level_mapping.step_expected_result: Verify the info icon is displayed well behind the string "Additional pages". Verify a tooltip with correct message is displayed well.

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: No additional pages info icon or tooltip elements found in this batch.

step_level_mapping.step_action: Check the message below "Additional pages". Check the Complimentary pages progress bar. Check total pages printed info.
step_level_mapping.step_expected_result: Verify a message with the amount of blocks already bought is displayed well. Verify the "Complimentary pages" progress bar is full filled with the black color and the value is displayed correctly (such as "10 of 10 used"). Verify correct number(such as 15 pages) displayed according to the printed pages.

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: No elements for additional pages message, complimentary pages progress bar, or total pages count found in this batch.

test_data_components_found_in_this_batch.notes: Expected values are hardcoded in test case.

step_level_mapping.step_action: Verify the test case is complete.

verification_components_found_in_this_ba.notes: This is a summary step with no specific UI elements required.

test_case_mappings.batch_coverage_summary: This batch contains UI metadata for HP Smart home page, authentication controls, billing payment form, and dashboard pages. Only one component was found relevant to this test case: the Pause Instant Ink button needed for precondition 4. The test case primarily requires Print and Payment History page elements (Billing Cycle Period card, progress bars, tooltips, page count displays) which are NOT present in this batch. These elements likely exist in other batches containing Print and Payment History page metadata. The batch also lacks API helper methods needed for printer enrollment, subscription verification, time manipulation, and page printing simulation. Authentication elements in this batch (username, password, sign-in) may be useful if the test requires login as a precondition, though this is not explicitly stated in the test case. The base URL constant provides partial test data coverage for navigation steps.
